title: Per-team Elo strength (for client strength-of-schedule)
description: The exact Elo ratings scripts/build_predictions.py used to price every game probability this run (2025-reverted priors plus any in-season chaining). Published so the PWA can compute a per-player strength-of-schedule from mean opponent Elo without re-deriving strength. Not a new model - it is the same `ratings` map, so SoS can never disagree with game_predictions. Validated by scripts/validate_data.py.

ratings.description: canonical team abbrev -> Elo rating. ~32 teams.
